ac_verdicts.ac_text: All 41 APIP stories (APIP-0010 through APIP-6003, excluding APIP-1010 and APIP-1030) are present in KB after import, verified by kb_list_stories({ feature: "apip", limit: 100 }) returning >= 41 results.
All imported stories have a valid StoryStateSchema state. No story has a ghost state value (uat, ready_to_work, in_review, ready_for_review, deferred).
Stories in the UAT/ stage directory are imported with state completed.
Stories in in-progress/ (APIP-1060, APIP-5007) are imported with state in_progress.
Stories in needs-code-review/ (APIP-0040, APIP-1050) are imported with state needs_code_review.
Stories in ready-for-qa/ (APIP-3010) are imported with state ready_for_qa.
APIP-6003 (ready-to-work stage) is imported with state ready.
APIP-1031 and APIP-1032 (status uat in .md frontmatter, UAT proof artifacts present) are imported with state completed.
The import is idempotent — running it twice produces identical KB state with no errors and no duplicate records.
Each story is imported with feature: "apip" and epic: "autonomous-pipeline" set.
Story titles match exactly the titles found in story.yaml or .md frontmatter in the worktree — no truncation or normalization errors.
Stories with no story.yaml (APIP-0020, APIP-1031, APIP-1032, APIP-5001, APIP-1060, etc.) are still imported using metadata from .md frontmatter or contextually inferred values.
